prompt: Create a .tscn file for a treasure chest pickup in my Godot 4 RPG. It should be an Area2D root node named 'Chest', with a Sprite2D child for the chest visual (texture at res://assets/sprites/items/chest.png), a CollisionShape2D child with a CircleShape2D (radius 16) for player detection, and a script attached at res://scripts/pickups/chest.gd.

assertions.text: Correct section ordering: header -> ext_resource -> sub_resource -> node
Script attached via ExtResource on root node
No GDScript syntax (preload, load, var, func) in file
Root node has no parent attribute
No fabricated uid:// values (Godot generates these)
